---
title: "CMU 10-414/714: Deep Learning Systems"
author: "Chao Ma"
date: "2026-06-12"
---

Notes from CMU 10-414/714 Deep Learning Systems, focused on the systems and mathematical foundations needed to build deep learning workloads.

---

::: {.content-grid}

::: {.content-card}
**[Lecture 2: ML Refresher / Softmax Regression](cmu-dlsys-lecture-2-ml-refresher-softmax-regression.qmd)**
Hypothesis classes, loss functions, optimization, softmax regression, cross-entropy, gradient descent, SGD, and the softmax gradient.
:::

:::
